Concepts8 Decisions5 Devlog7 Notes3 Symbols4

Symbols

Important code symbols and where maintainers should look first.

Symbol

4 records

SymbolFor developers

addBotToLibraryGroup

Adds one existing bot to a mutable saved bot group while pruning stale IDs and refusing built-in, duplicate, missing, or full-group cases.

symbolbotsgroupsux
SymbolFor developers

embedTextLocal

Embeds text through the local Ollama embedding model so memory and semantic search can remain local-first.

symbolprivacyembedding
SymbolFor developers

getAuxiliaryProvider

Builds the auxiliary provider path used for summarization and support work, pinned to local Ollama behavior rather than hidden online calls.

symbolprivacyprovider
SymbolFor developers

selectProvider

Selects the chat provider while preserving the LOCAL privacy invariant; local requests return LocalOllamaProvider instead of escalating to cloud...

symbolprivacyprovider
Created with Wikiwiki.
